title: The Creation of the World
snippet: God creates the heavens, the earth, and everything in them.
moral: God made everything with love and purpose.

title: Noah's Ark
snippet: God saves Noah's family and the animals through a great flood.
moral: God keeps His promises and cares for those who trust Him.

title: David and Goliath
snippet: A young shepherd defeats a giant with faith in God.
moral: With God, no challenge is too big.

title: The Birth of Jesus
snippet: Jesus is born in Bethlehem and laid in a manger.

title: The Good Samaritan
snippet: Jesus teaches us to love our neighbor through action.

title: The Prodigal Son
snippet: A lost son returns home and is welcomed by his father.
moral: God always welcomes us back with love.
